decisions.reasoning: Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Gholdengo, and since Gholdengo is holding an Air Balloon, it is not immune to Fire-type moves. Taking the KO immediately removes a significant threat from the opponent's team.
Gholdengo is at 4% HP and Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO. Even with the Air Balloon, Flare Blitz will connect and secure the KO.

Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, removing a major offensive threat immediately. Since I am currently at 49% HP, securing the KO is the highest priority to prevent the opponent from potentially finishing me off next turn.
Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the optimal choice here as it resists Flutter Mane's STAB moves and can threaten it with Sucker Punch if it stays in.

Kingambit is threatened by a 2HKO from Flare Blitz and cannot deal significant damage to Incineroar due to Intimidate and type resistance. Switching to Calyrex-Ice preserves Kingambit for later and forces the opponent to deal with a much higher threat.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the optimal choice to resist Incineroar's Flare Blitz and Knock Off, providing a safe defensive pivot.

Incineroar threatens a 2HKO with Flare Blitz while Kingambit deals negligible damage due to Intimidate and resistance. Switching to Dragonite provides a safe pivot that resists Fire-type moves and maintains momentum.
